definition: The degree to which a deliverable connects surface recommendations to underlying system structure. Shallow work gives clients what to do. Deep work gives them why, how the components interact, what breaks first, and what follow-on decisions the current one triggers. Architectural depth is the signature Sarif applies to every engagement, regardless of domain.
matters: It is the quality bar. It also explains why Sarif's deliverables look different from standard consulting output: every page is load-bearing, every recommendation is traceable to a system-level insight.
appears: Services page (as the output standard across all four practice areas). Engagements page (as the connective thread across diverse case studies). Methodology essays.
